notes: Do these regardless of skill and level.
AFK RuneSpan event with a flat 25,000 XP reward per day. Strong before 70 Runecrafting.
details: The Ahelp Discord is useful for calls.

notes: Great before level 60 Prayer, Farming, and Dungeoneering.
details: Alt1 has a Utility > Nemi Forest addon.

notes: The penguin questline provides additional points. Use XP lamps on Agility until 56, then Herblore.
Bonus experience from Agoroth can be used on Herblore and combined with this.
Provides XP in your lowest skill.
Provides early Ranged, Magic, and Agility experience.
details: You can skip Magic/Ranged and just do Agility.

notes: Provides a small amount of bonus XP that scales with level and can be used on Herblore.
Travel to Player-owned Port and help Meg for GP and an XP lamp.
Start as soon as you can. These lead to future best-in-slot jewelry and early Slayer XP/points.
details: There is a weekly cap of 300 points. Buy Reaper's Choice and Reaper scroll first.

notes: Prioritize air, water, earth, fire, blood, soul, and astral runes.
details: Useful shops include Mage Bank, Wizard's Guild, Lunar Isle, Mage of Zamorak, Pest Control, and Ali's Discount Wares after The Feud.

stoppingPoint: 75 Fletching for River of Blood or 82 Fletching for Zygomyte carestyling
notes: Burthorpe and Canifis have separate stocks; Wilderness Bandit Camp is optional.
details: Buy as many as you can afford for easy Fletching training later.
Thalmund appears each Wednesday with a different stock of Necromancy items.

notes: Can be cast 3 times weekly and allows you to reset timegated content.
details: Requires time runes from Runecrafting, Wizards' Tower master mages, or Heists.

notes: Use on Agility, Herblore, or any skill you dislike training.
details: The XP reward book can be banked and used later in the month.

notes: Provides Construction and Prayer or Slayer experience.
details: Recommended for Prayer before 75 and Plague's End.

notes: Provides Fishing and Farming XP that scales later, plus clue scroll rewards that scale with total level.
Make Runecrafting effigies and gain large Runecrafting experience by training Farming with them in your inventory.
details: Requires Sins of the Father to access.
